name: Stalexport Autostrady S.A.
summary: Stalexport Autostrady S.A., together with its subsidiaries, constructs and operates motorways in Poland. The company operates a Katowice-Krak√É¬≥w section of the A4 motorway. It also constructs roads and railroads; leases office and parking spaces. The company was formerly known as STALEXPORT S.A. and changed its name to Stalexport Autostrady S.A. in September 2007. Stalexport Autostrady S.A. was founded in 1963 and is based in Myslowice, Poland.
